creator: jkoshy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for this excellent bug report.  I wish more PRS were as thorough 
and detailed like this.  The patch has been committed along with a few 
more errors I discovered when reviewing the changes. 
Committed to rev 1.17 of " src/share/man/man7/mdoc.samples.7", thanks!
